channel.title: Saurabh Jain
channel.description: Security engineer writing about cloud security, bug bounties, AWS, and the grey areas no one puts on a slide deck.

item.title: Unauthenticated Access to AWS via Cognito Identity Pool ID
item.description: How an exposed Cognito Identity Pool ID can hand attackers temporary AWS credentials — no login required.

item.title: Cracked AWS Cloud Practitioner in 2 Weeks
item.description: How I passed AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner (CLF-C02) in two weeks with prior hands-on experience and a focused study plan.

item.title: Security Engineer Interview Questions Part-6
item.description: Part 6 of the series covering security engineer interview questions, including AWS IMDSv2 security enhancements and why CORS alone cannot prevent CSRF attacks.

item.title: Security Engineer Interview Questions Part-3
item.description: Part 3 of the series covers AWS network architecture, specifically where to place a Load Balancer and S3 Bucket within public and private subnets for optimal security.
